title: Launch HN: Voker (YC S24) – Analytics for AI Agents
full_text:
🗲
Install via AI
Past our prompt into you AI coding tool
Open your AI coding tool Open your preferred AI coding assistant and start a new chat or agent session
Copy and paste this prompt The prompt tells your AI tool exactly what to install and how to configure it.
Follow the guided setup Your AI tool will scaffold the VokerSDK, add your API key, and instrument your first event. Takes about 2 minutes.
Prompt
Copy
Install Voker AI Analytics in this project. Follow the official Quick Start Guide for the SDK at app.voker.ai/docs. Initialize it with my API key and define my first agent named 'default_agent'.
Make sure your AI agents are helping, not just responding.
Voker is analytics for the agentic era, so you can build the best agents possible.
Get Started See How it Works
🗲 Install via AI pip install voker
Copied
Do you really know what your agents are saying to your users?
It feels like you're flying blind
Scanning traces doesn't tell you if agents are helpful, accurate, or hitting walls. You only find out when customers complain or attrition skyrockets.
Getting helpful usage data is resource-intensive
Every stakeholder needs data. Every request pulls engineers away from building. Nobody can self-serve insights.
Proving Agent ROI is difficult
Product and business teams need to quantify AI investments. You have usage stats, but struggling to connect agent performance to conversion, retention, or revenue.
One platform. Complete visibility. Better Agents.
Voker transforms AI agent interactions into structured analytics that anyone on your team can use.
Self-Service Analytics
PMs, analysts, and business teams get digestible insights they need without tickets, bottlenecks, or delays.
Performance Intelligence
Track what AI agents are saying, identify knowledge gaps, detect abnormalities, and measure improvement over time.
Business Impact
Connect agent metrics to outcomes that matter by correlating conversational data with user data you're already collecting.
Self-Service Analytics
PMs, analysts, and business teams get digestible insights they need without tickets, bottlenecks, or delays.
Business Impact
Connect agent metrics to outcomes that matter by correlating conversational data with user data you're already collecting.
Performance Intelligence
Track what AI agents are saying, identify knowledge gaps, detect abnormalities, and measure improvement over time.
Self-Service Analytics
PMs, analysts, and business teams get digestible insights they need without tickets, bottlenecks, or delays.
Performance Intelligence
Track what AI agents are saying, identify knowledge gaps, detect abnormalities, and measure improvement over time.
Business Impact
Connect agent metrics to outcomes that matter by correlating conversational data with user data you're already collecting.
Self-Service Analytics
PMs, analysts, and business teams get digestible insights they need without tickets, bottlenecks, or delays.
Performance Intelligence
Track what AI agents are saying, identify knowledge gaps, detect abnormalities, and measure improvement over time.
Business Impact
Connect agent metrics to outcomes that matter by correlating conversational data with user data you're already collecting.
Intents
Corrections
Resolutions
Intents
Identify what your user wants. Voker automatically classifies user goals from natural conversation.
Help me book my next vacation.”
Corrections
Detect when your user isn't getting what they want. Surface friction before it becomes churn.
Help me book my next vacation.”
No, you got the dates wrong... again. It was 4/5 - 4/18
Resolutions
Recognize when your agent solves a user's intent. Measure success rates across every interaction.
No, you got the dates wrong... again. It was 4/5 - 4/18
Got it, booking your flight for 4/5 - 4/18.
Made for teams building best-in-class agent products
High interaction volume (1k+ chat sessions per month)
Complex multi-turn conversations (tools, RAG, MCP)
Cross-functional teams that need agent insights
Works with your stack. No vendor lock-in. Own your data.
Voker supports any LLM framework or model, with seamless integration for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
OpenAI
Anthropic
Gemini
Langchain
CrewAI
Vercel AI SDK
Lightweight SDK
Python & Typescript. Two lines to install.
Own Your Data
Retain full ownership of your data.
Self Hosting Available
Architected with Enterprise needs in mind.
Get to insights with just a few lines of code
Lightweight integration. No infrastructure changes required. Start free and scale as you grow.
Install the SDK
One code snippet, any framework
pip install voker
Copied
Connect your agents
Automatic data collection starts
from voker.ai.provider_openai import OpenAI
Copied
Start analyzing
Dashboard populates with insights
app.voker.ai/
Try Voker Free View Documentation
See Voker in action
Watch how teams use Voker to monitor and
improve their agents.
Everything you need to understand your agents
Powerful features built for teams running high-volume conversational AI.
Queryable Conversation Timelines
See agent conversations through the eyes of your users. Search topics, intents, and issues across all conversations.
Agent Performance Tracking
Quantify improvements when you make changes. Know when to roll back if an update breaks your system.
User Behavior Insights
Track what users ask, whether agents deliver. Get alerted when users become frustrated or rage-quit.
Ecosystem Friendly
Works alongside Langfuse, Langsmith, PostHog, Mixpanel, Amplitude, and others.
Trusted by product teams that require the best
“When customers flood our Slack with the same agent issue, we're scrambling with what's going on, how widespread, how bad? We gave up on building evals: it's an endless reactive battle you can't win. Voker shows us agent performance and emergent user behavior before it lands as a customer complaint.”
Ves Stoyanov,
Co-Founder of Lightfield
Trusted by product teams that require the best
"Data drives all of our decisions at True Classic, but we didn’t have a way to track AI performance. Voker made it possible to monitor and optimize our AI features quickly."
Ben Yahalom,
CEO of True Classic
Trusted by product teams that require the best
"Voker has allowed us to optimize our agents in production, ensuring ROI positive outcomes in record time without impacting engineering resources."
Carlos Moreno,
CTO of Dutch
Trusted by product teams that require the best
"With Voker, we can iterate on improving our agents much faster than competitors. It's streamlined everything for us"
Ariel Herrera,
CTO of Coffee Clozers
Trusted by product teams that require the best
"Voker has been a fantastic partner for us. With their intents and resolution tracking, we’ve learned where we need to make investments in product & customer success, and where we’re crushing our goals!"
Peter Greig,
VP of Data & Analytics at Lull
Backed by
Start free, scale as your agents grow
Plans for every stage of your agent journey. Start free, scale as your agents grow. Invite the whole team.
Free

/ month
Experimenting with adding agents to your product. Capture analytics from day one.
